originalTitle: Benson Boone - The Time Of My Life (Official Music Video)
content: Benson Boone - The Time Of My Life (Official Music Video) Stream "The Time Of My Life": https://bensonboone.lnk.to/TheTimeofMyLife Follow Benson Boone: 🔔 Subscribe to Benson's Channel: https://bit.ly/3RV5Na8 http://www.BensonBoone.com https://www.Tiktok.com/@bensonboone http://www.Instagram.com/BensonBoone http://www.Twitter.com/BensonBoone http://www.Facebook.com/BensonBoone Credits: director - monty jackson assistants - jake mitchell, cassie johnson, jose santiago, zoe sedano, tyrone zhang tailoring team - megan bright, anna vales make up artist (alix) - diane buzzetta hair stylist (alix) - vincent pelletier make-up artist (cast) - kandi hernandez make-up assistant (cast) - katherine moncada wardrobe stylist (cast) - rachel haas wardrobe assistant (cast) - molly stack craft service - karla padilla craft service assistant - sylvia martinez spfx - simon white medic - robert morales key pa - alex baik ad pa - sherome petty pa's - malcolm fontana, aaron meritt, ian welfley, robert gillard, isabel alegria, nicholas reinoso, daniel escobar, ivan montano edit - matt eastin & benson boone color - nicholas metcalf / company 3 Ren Wightman as "The Dragon" Warner Records EVP, Creative - Norman Wonderly Creative Services - Lydia Sarno Management Jeff Burns, Ryan Hasara and Lukas Sanchez Reynolds Management Lyrics: I am having the time of my life And I wish that you were still right here. I wish you came along. You, why did you leave me so soon? Before all the flowers could bloom? I wish you came along. And now that every day is a party, Every night's a nightmare, Wishing you came along. Yes, I’m having the time of my life But something about it feels so off. I wish you came along. If, if this is as good as it gets Then why is my head such a mess, dear? Oh, why is it all so wrong? Cause now, that every day’s a party, Every night's a nightmare. I can’t let go in my head Without wishing you came along. I am having the time of my life And I wish that you were still right here, I wish you came along. And I’ll be standing here like a stone, Waves are crashing down years of passion. How can the world keep moving on? I will never let myself move on. This isn’t real life; this isn’t over. This isn’t real life; this isn’t over, dear. It can’t be over, dear. #BensonBoone #newmusic #thetimeofmylife #alixearle
